Rules.InvariantScript:
If(
    ThisItem.targetScreen = App.ActiveScreen.Name || 
    ThisItem.targetScreen = NAVBAR.ParentScreen.Name || 
    ThisItem.targetScreen = NAVBAR.ParentScreen2.Name,
    
    NAVBAR.AccentColor,
    NAVBAR.BgColor
)

Switch(
    ThisItem.icon,
    "Home", Icon.Home,
    "Document", Icon.Document,
    "Settings", Icon.Settings,
    "Search", Icon.Search,
    "Add", Icon.Add,
    "Edit", Icon.Edit,
    "Save", Icon.Save,
    "Cancel", Icon.Cancel,
    "Download", Icon.Download,
    "Mail", Icon.Mail,
    "User", Icon.People,
    "Warning", Icon.Warning,
    "Help", Icon.Help,
    "ListWatchlistRemind", Icon.ListWatchlistRemind,
    "ListScrollWatchlist", Icon.ListScrollWatchlist,
    "ToolsWrench", Icon.ToolsWrench,
    "AddUser", Icon.AddUser,
    "People", Icon.People,
    "Trending", Icon.Trending
)

Switch(
    ThisItem.targetScreen,
    "DASHBOARD", Navigate(NAVBAR.DashboardMenu, ScreenTransition.Fade),
    "NOTIFICATION_LIST", Navigate(NAVBAR.NotificationMenu, ScreenTransition.Fade),
    "WORKORDER_LIST", Navigate(NAVBAR.WorkOrderMenu, ScreenTransition.Fade),
    "WORKORDER_LIST_SV", Navigate(NAVBAR.WorkOrderSvMenu, ScreenTransition.Fade),
    "TASK_LIST", Navigate(NAVBAR.TaskMenu, ScreenTransition.Fade),
    "SYSTEMCONFIGURATION_LIST", Navigate(NAVBAR.SystemConfigurationMenu, ScreenTransition.Fade),
    "USER_LIST", Navigate(NAVBAR.UserMenu, ScreenTransition.Fade),
    "AUDITTRAIL_LIST", Navigate(NAVBAR.AuditMenu, ScreenTransition.Fade),
    "TEAM_LIST", Navigate(NAVBAR.TeamMenu, ScreenTransition.Fade),
    "REPORT_ANALYSIS", Navigate(NAVBAR.ReportAnalysis, ScreenTransition.Fade),
    "REPORT_ANALYSIS_HOU", Navigate(NAVBAR.ReportAnalysisHOU, ScreenTransition.Fade)
)

ControlPropertyState.AutoRuleBindingString:
Switch(
    ThisItem.targetScreen,
    "DASHBOARD", Navigate(NAVBAR.DashboardScreen, ScreenTransition.Fade),
    "NOTIFICATION_LIST", Navigate(NAVBAR.NotificationMenu, ScreenTransition.Fade),
    "WORKORDER_LIST", Navigate(NAVBAR.WorkOrderMenu, ScreenTransition.Fade),
    "TASK_LIST", Navigate(NAVBAR.TaskMenu, ScreenTransition.Fade)
)
